[
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "sin(A+B) = sin(A)cos(B) + cos(A)sin(B)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving addition of angles"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "sin(A-B) = sin(A)cos(B) - cos(A)sin(B)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",

    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving subtraction of angles"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "cos(A+B) = cos(A)cos(B) - sin(A)sin(B)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",

    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving addition of angles"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",

    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving subtraction of angles"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "tan(A+B) = (tan(A) + tan(B)) / (1 - tan(A)tan(B))",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving addition of angles"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "tan(A-B) = (tan(A) - tan(B)) / (1 + tan(A)tan(B))",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving subtraction of angles"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "sin(A/2) = ± √((1 - cos(A))/2)",
    "variables": "A is an angle in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find sine of half angle"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "cos(A/2) = ± √((1 + cos(A))/2)",
    "variables": "A is an angle in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find cosine of half angle"
  },
  {
    "name": "Trigonometric Identities",
    "formula": "tan(A/2) = ± √((1 - cos(A))/(1 + cos(A)))",
    "variables": "A is an angle in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to find tangent of half angle"
  },
  {
    "name": "Sum-to-Product Identities",
    "formula": "sin(A) + sin(B) = 2 sin((A+B)/2) cos((A-B)/2)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving sum of sines"
  },
  {
    "name": "Sum-to-Product Identities",
    "formula": "sin(A) - sin(B) = 2 cos((A+B)/2) sin((A-B)/2)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving difference of sines"
  },
  {
    "name": "Sum-to-Product Identities",
    "formula": "cos(A) + cos(B) = 2 cos((A+B)/2) cos((A-B)/2)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving sum of cosines"
  },
  {
    "name": "Sum-to-Product Identities",
    "formula": "cos(A) - cos(B) = -2 sin((A+B)/2) sin((A-B)/2)",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving difference of cosines"
  },
  {
    "name": "Product-to-Sum Identities",
    "formula": "sin(A)sin(B) = (1/2)(cos(A-B) - cos(A+B))",
    "variables": "A and B are angles in radians",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving product of sines"
  },

    "units": "",
    "notes": "Use to simplify trigonometric expressions involving product of cosines"
  },
